topic_definition: Technologies, platforms, and stacks that signal a legacy, pre-cloud-native, pre-LLM enterprise environment in software engineering job descriptions. These include mainframe languages, legacy Microsoft and Java EE stacks, deprecated database platforms, on-prem virtualization/identity tooling, legacy enterprise integration buses, and legacy desktop/client frameworks. The presence of these markers in a JD suggests maintenance of pre-2015-era enterprise systems rather than greenfield cloud-native or AI-era development.

concepts.name: Mainframe languages and platforms
concepts.definition: Languages and operating environments tied to IBM mainframe and midrange systems, typically used for legacy financial, insurance, and government workloads.
